description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages install, test, build, and deploy. In the install stage add an install_node_modules job that runs npm install, then cd frontend && npm install, and stores node_modules/ and frontend/node_modules/ as untracked artifacts. In the test stage add a test job that cd's into frontend and runs npm run test. In the build stage add a build job that removes node_modules, runs npm install --prod-only, builds the frontend with npm run build, and publishes node_modules/, frontend/build, and index.js as artifacts. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that depends on the build job, defines variables dest=/opt/cn and domain=test.devops, and executes a series of lxc exec commands to create the destination directory, copy the build output via tar, move the cnapp.service file, reload systemd, enable and start the service.
